candidates.why: Direct total revenue line; duplicates Net Sales in shown years but is a total/subtotal style label.
Most specific top-line sales/revenue line and matches Total Revenue numerically in shown years.
Explicit balancing row, not an operating revenue line.
Operating expense, not revenue.

variables.notes: Using Net Sales as preferred top-line label, with Total Revenue as fallback because labels may change over time and values match in the preview.

candidates.why: Best match for direct production/service costs; appears between revenue and operating overhead lines.
Personnel/employee costs are a classic SG&A overhead component.
Broad operating overhead bucket; appropriate when no explicit SG&A subtotal is present.
Selling expense component, but appears to be a subcomponent and only populated in some years.
Administrative/overhead-style component, but appears to be a subcomponent under Other Operating Expenses for some years.
Dedicated R&D line exists, but it appears below operating result in this preview, so should not be added to XSGA under the placement rule.
Balance-sheet asset, not SG&A expense.
Balance-sheet gross asset rollforward item, not SG&A expense.
Balance-sheet/intangible asset item, not current-period SG&A expense.
Balance-sheet asset item, not SG&A expense.
Balance-sheet accumulated amortization item, excluded from SG&A.
Balance-sheet asset item, not SG&A expense.

variables.notes: No explicit SG&A subtotal is present. Selected the main overhead buckets and excluded COGS and D&A. Did not add Marketing and other sales promotion or External services because they appear to be subcomponents of Other Operating Expenses in some years; prefer minimal non-duplicative coverage. Did not include Research & Development because its line appears below Operating result, so adding it to XSGA would violate the placement rule and risk double counting.

candidates.why: Dedicated R&D expense line; appears in the income statement, though positioned below operating result in this preview.
Capitalized development asset balance, not current-period R&D expense.
Gross balance-sheet asset, not income-statement R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Accumulated amortization/impairment balance-sheet item, not R&D expense.
Balance-sheet intangible/development amount, not clearly period expense.
Balance-sheet gross asset item, not expense.
Balance-sheet amortization item, not R&D expense.
Balance-sheet asset item, not expense.

variables.notes: Dedicated R&D line exists on the income statement, so map XRD to it. It appears below Operating result in the preview, so it is not also included in XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.why: Broader finance-cost label; use only if no direct interest expense line is available.
Most direct preferred label for interest expense; appears twice in the sheet and is acceptable as a changing label over time.
Plural variant of direct interest expense label; suitable fallback.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses of the financial liabilities measured at amortized cost
candidates.why: Specific interest-expense component with visible values in several years.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Specific lease-interest component; narrower than total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental disclosure and sign may differ; lower priority than primary statement lines.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses of the financial liabilities measured at amortized cost

variables.notes: Priority list uses direct interest-expense labels first, then the specific measured-at-amortized-cost interest line, then broader Financial Expenses as last fallback. Excluded lease-interest supplemental line to avoid using a narrower/supplemental disclosure before broader primary lines.

candidates.why: Single equity component, not total book equity.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to shareholders of the Parent company
candidates.why: Best match for book equity excluding non-controlling interests, which is preferred by the rules.
Total equity; would include NCI if present, so less preferred than parent-company equity.
Balancing row, not a reported equity measure.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet, not equity.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to shareholders of the Parent company

variables.notes: Preferred owner/parent equity line first because it excludes non-controlling interests. Included Total equity as fallback if the label changes over time.

candidates.why: Income-statement allocation line, not preferred for balance-sheet minority interest.
Income-statement allocation line, not preferred for balance-sheet minority interest.
Correct balance-sheet label for minority interest, but appears blank and total equity equals parent equity in shown years, suggesting none exists.
Correct concept if reported, but appears blank and likely absent.

variables.notes: No non-controlling interest appears to exist: Total equity matches Equity attributable to shareholders of the Parent company in the preview, and the NCI labels are blank. Using empty mapping avoids double counting.
